角色管理用于定义管理角色及权限范围: Role management is used to define administrative roles and permission scopes, supporting role creation, editing, and permission binding.
仅限平台级别角色非租户角色: Platform-level roles only, not tenant roles.
禁用角色将导致绑定用户失去权限: Disabling a role will cause bound users to lose the associated permissions.
搜索角色编码或名称: Search by role code or name
角色编码最长100字: Role code must not exceed 100 characters
角色名称最长100字: Role name must not exceed 100 characters
点击新增角色按钮填写编码名称和描述: Click the 'Add Role' button to fill in the code, name, and description
在列表中搜索或按状态筛选角色: Search or filter roles by status in the list
点击编辑修改角色信息: Click edit to modify role information
点击禁用启用切换角色状态: Click disable/enable to toggle role status
点击绑定权限为角色分配权限码: Click 'Bind Permissions' to assign permission codes to the role
点击绑定成员将用户添加到角色: Click 'Bind Members' to add users to the role
角色编码全局唯一创建后不可修改: Role code is globally unique and cannot be changed after creation
角色名称用于界面显示的友好名称: Role name is the friendly name displayed on the interface
描述填写角色的职责和权限范围: Description describes the role's responsibilities and permission scope
角色编码已存在时创建将失败: Creation will fail if the role code already exists
禁用角色后绑定用户将失去对应权限: After disabling a role, bound users will lose the corresponding permissions
删除角色前需先解除权限和成员绑定: Before deleting a role, unbind permissions and members first
